do: Use min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] for all tappable elements
dont: Make buttons smaller than 44pt

do: Use hitSlop={12} for small icons
dont: Leave small icons without extended touch area

do: Use useSafeAreaInsets() for top/bottom padding
dont: Ignore safe areas let content hide behind notch

do: Add extra padding for home indicator on iPhone
dont: Let bottom sheets overlap home indicator

do: Use Haptics.impactAsync() for button presses
dont: No haptic feedback on important actions

do: Light for toggles Medium for buttons Heavy for errors
dont: Same haptic for all interactions

do: Use KeyboardAvoidingView with proper behavior
dont: Let keyboard cover input fields

do: Implement keyboard dismiss on scroll/tap outside
dont: Keep keyboard open when tapping outside inputs

do: Show skeleton placeholders during loading
dont: Show blank screen or spinner only

do: Update UI immediately then sync with server
dont: Wait for server response to update UI

do: Support iOS back gesture on stack navigators
dont: Disable swipe back gesture

do: Implement pull to refresh on scrollable lists
dont: Force users to tap refresh button

do: Use spring animations for natural feel
dont: Use linear timing for UI animations

do: Respect prefers-reduced-motion setting
dont: Ignore accessibility motion preferences

do: Keep animations 200-400ms for UI interactions
dont: Use animations longer than 500ms for feedback

do: Use FlashList or FlatList for long lists
dont: Use ScrollView with map for long lists

do: Add RefreshControl to scrollable lists
dont: Omit refresh functionality on data lists

do: Keep bottom tabs visible on main screens
dont: Hide tabs on every navigation

do: Always provide clear way to go back
dont: Trap users on screens without back option

do: Support iOS Dynamic Type for accessibility
dont: Use fixed font sizes only

do: Use leading-relaxed for body text readability
dont: Use tight line height for paragraphs

do: Use blurhash or placeholder while loading
dont: Show broken image icon during load

do: Maintain consistent aspect ratios in lists
dont: Let images have random aspect ratios

do: Show inline validation errors immediately
dont: Wait for submit to show all errors

do: Auto-focus first input on form screens
dont: Require user to tap to start typing
